content.text: Field Catalog, launch printing. Every entry in this document has invoiced at least one squad.

Every entry is a profile card (see Enemy Framework): Stat · Signature · Break · Carve · Graft. Anything an entry doesn't print, it inherits from its tier chassis on Enemy Framework. Dome opposition wears the player armor ladder — values live on Armor. Carve processing and its clocks live on Carving; graft installation lives on Mutations & Grafts.
Companion-grade blocks for the Char Hound and Gorecap Boar — the tamed versions, with the injury ladder — live on Influence.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Fodder chassis. d8+1; 1d6 blade or sidearm.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Standard chassis in Contractor Standard (see Armor). d8+2; 2d6 carbine.

entries.label: Signature
entries.value: Falls back to cover by training.

entries.label: Break
entries.value: Doctrine — officer down or shell broken.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Standard chassis, Bruiser, in Heavy Plate (see Armor). Scattergun (see Weapons) and tower shield — the shield grants allies cover.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Elite chassis in Corp Tactical (see Armor). d8+3; 2d8.

entries.label: Signature
entries.value: Calls — the enemy Warcaller: marks targets and repositions its side (the player-side verb lives on Influence). The adds are only dangerous while this is alive.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Elite chassis in Raid Mail (see Armor). 3d10 shock maul, Impact.

entries.label: Break
entries.value: None — it never retreats; doctrine forbids it.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Shell 3/2/12, no flesh. d10+2; 2d8. Overwatch-pattern behavior — fires on band changes.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Fodder chassis, fast — moves 2 bands. d10+1; 1d6 bite. Arrives in hordes (see Enemy Framework).

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Horde unit. Cluster contact damage; enclosed targets tick +1 Charge per round (see Charge & Saturation).

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Hide 2, HP 26. d8+2; 2d10 gore, push 1 band.

entries.label: Break
entries.value: Wounded past half: desperate first — +1 damage die, won't disengage. Flees only under 25%.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Hide 1, Skirmisher — 3 bands per turn. d10+2; 2d6.

entries.label: Break
entries.value: Any solid hit — it was never committed.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Flesh. Ranged toxin spit to Medium band; rider: Seared (see Conditions).

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Hide 3, HP 45. d8+2; 3d10 trample — hits an Adjacent cluster, contested to avoid (see Bands & Movement).

entries.label: Break
entries.value: Desperate at half; breaks at a quarter.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Shell 5/4/18 over Flesh 30. Two claws, 2d8 each, plus grab (contested).

entries.label: Signature
entries.value: Crack the carapace — a free boss phase in miniature.

entries.label: Stat
entries.value: Hide 2, Elite chassis. Projects an Adjacent-cluster null field: patterns fired into or out of it cost +1 round (see Patterns).

entries.label: Break
entries.value: Desperate; never flees inside its own field.

content.label: PARKED
content.text: Exotic beasts are parked. The fourteen entries above are the entire statted roster — nothing beyond them exists in the docs, and parked items stay parked. Flag the need; don't stat it.

content.label: DESIGN GAP
content.text: Unprinted specifics: the Glowcap Swarm's contact damage dice; the Spitting Lurker's tier, accuracy die, and spit damage; the Char Strider's tier (so its HP has no chassis row to inherit). Where a tier is printed, missing values come from the chassis on Enemy Framework.
Wellspring Field Catalog appendix: a graft-viable organ is premium contraband only while refrigerated. Plan extraction accordingly. The organ's previous owner did not.
